query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role, c.programId, p.name AS programName, c.isActive
FROM consultors c 
LEFT JOIN programs p ON c.programId = p.id
WHERE c.role = 'gerente' AND c.isActive = 1
ORDER BY c.name;
